_comment: Track D — map each style to a Canva brand template + its autofill field names. Get field names from GET /brand-templates/{id}/dataset (or scripts/canva-auth.js once authorized). Copy this to canva-templates.json and fill real ids/names after creating the templates in Canva. Logical keys (headline/photo/body/cta) are how the bot refers to them; values are the EXACT field names inside your Canva template.
